headline: Blitar flood delays classes near affected school areas
summary: Banjir di Blitar menyebabkan genangan di kawasan sekolah dan menunda kegiatan belajar pada beberapa lokasi terdampak.
summary_id: Banjir di Blitar menyebabkan genangan di kawasan sekolah dan menunda kegiatan belajar pada beberapa lokasi terdampak.
summary_en: Flooding in Blitar caused inundation near school areas and delayed classes at several affected sites.
